title: Scenario Modeler
adjustPrompt: Adjust parameters to see scenario comparison.
requiresVoyageData: Note: Requires voyage data for the selected year.
noVoyages: No voyages found for the selected year. Create a voyage first to run scenarios.
noFuelData: Voyages exist but have no fuel consumption data. Add fuel entries to your voyage legs to see CII, FuelEU, and ETS results.
noEuCoverage: None of your voyages involve EU/EEA ports, so FuelEU Maritime and EU ETS do not apply. These regulations only cover voyages to, from, or between EU/EEA ports. CII is still calculated globally.
